author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-tree audit complete. 22 of 24 sklearn tree+ensemble estimators present; only StackingClassifier/StackingRegressor remain absent (existing #41/#42).

Sub-issues closed in this pass:
- #267 wired orphaned BaggingClassifier/Regressor + AdaBoostRegressor into lib.rs
- #268 score() on all 18 fitted classifier/regressor estimators (mean accuracy / R²)
- #269 predict_proba on the 6 missing classifiers (RF, GB, HGB, AdaBoost, Bagging, Voting)
- #270 predict_log_proba on all 9 classifiers
- #271 feature_importances_ via HasFeatureImportances on the 4 missing types (AdaBoost cls/reg, Bagging cls/reg) using new shared aggregate_tree_importances helper
- #272 decision_function on GB/HGB/AdaBoost classifiers
- #275 proof-of-API integration test (12 tests)

Filed during audit (deferred):
- #273 staged_predict / staged_predict_proba / staged_decision_function on boosting estimators
- #274 apply() / decision_path() on tree-based estimators
- #276 IsolationForest::score_samples sign convention divergence

Existing related issues (deferred to their own work):
- #40, #41, #42 StackingClassifier / StackingRegressor (missing estimators)
- #48-52 tree pruning / advanced ctor params (max_leaf_nodes, ccp_alpha, monotonic_cst, splitter, etc.)
- #53 warm_start + oob_score for forests
- #54 sample_weight for all tree estimators
- #55 export_graphviz + export_text

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- VotingClassifier/Regressor with a heterogeneous-depth ensemble (sklearn requires a list of pre-built estimators; ferrolearn just takes a max_depths vec)
- HistGradientBoosting native NaN + best-first growth toggles already present

Verification: 355 tests pass (310 unit + 12 api_proof + 7 oracle + 5 proptest + 7 sklearn_equiv + 14 doctest). Zero regressions.
